title: 516 Pcs Gem Stickers Acrylic Jewel Stickers Heart Rhinestone Sticker Craft Gems Self Adhesive for Body Nails Makeup Utensils (Pink Silver)
features: What You Will Get: 516pcs bling acrylic heart rhinestones in various colors, contains three sizes, 18mm/0.71in, 12mm/0.47in, 10mm/0.39in, 6mm/0.23in which will meet your different needs in your DIY activities, and you can also share them with your friends
Excellent Material: the diamond stickers are made of high-quality acrylic, not easy to damage, brilliant and dazzling, very textured, the stickers are strong and not easy to fall off

Easy to Use: the heart stickers are self-adhesive and can be pasted without any glue, you can easily remove the shiny rhinestone stickers and stick them on crafts and activities, no traces will be left when peeled off, very convenient for your use

Wide Usage: the sticker gems for crafts kids can not only be used for DIY crafts, but also can be used for mobile phones, laptops, glasses, face rhinestones, body and nails. You can also use it to decorate your items as well as your room, it is the best choice for your decoration

Creative Gift: the rhinestone stickers are not only craft decorations, but also a link of communication between you and your children. It can stimulate children's image power and creativity, exercise hand-eye coordination and color perception, children will love this gift
description: Gem stickers for crafts are blingbling and shining, come and let us DIY together!
